name: Asparagus with Hazelnut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash asparagus under cold running water.
2. Snap off the lower end of each stalk with your fingers, allowing the stalk to break where it wants to for only the tender portion.
3. Cook young, tender asparagus in a steamer for 5-7 minutes or mature stalks for 7-10 minutes. Do not overcook asparagus, as it will lose flavor and nutrients.
4. In a small heavy skillet, heat hazelnuts and butter until the butter melts. Stir thoroughly to mix.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vinegar. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Pour the hazelnut butter over hot asparagus and serve immediately.
